final_prompt.prompt:
Create a marketing poster (short-video vertical cover) for GGU gaming monitor product launch, consumer electronics industry.

Style/medium: clean flat graphic design with minimal premium aesthetic, sharp typography, bold editorial layout in the spirit of high-end tech product reveals
Composition: rule-of-thirds layout — large bold headline anchored in upper third, product visual centered in middle third, supporting tagline in lower third; portrait orientation
Subject: gaming monitor product cover featuring headline text "8k GGU 电竞显示器 1000hz" as dominant oversized display type, with supporting line "全球首发全新面板 低延迟 完美色彩"
Scene/backdrop: deep dark background (near-black or rich dark navy) to maximize contrast and premium feel
Lighting/mood: subtle edge glow or accent light suggesting screen luminance, sleek and futuristic, confident and eye-catching
Color palette: dark background as base, bright accent color (electric blue or vivid white) for headline text, secondary muted tone for tagline
Text (verbatim): "8k GGU 电竞显示器 1000hz" as primary headline; "全球首发全新面板 低延迟 完美色彩" as secondary line
Constraints: headline must be oversized and immediately legible at thumbnail scale; layout must work as 9:16 vertical cover; minimal decorative clutter
Avoid: gradients that muddy text legibility, overcrowded layout, generic gaming RGB rainbow clichés, watermarks, blurry type
